description: This Python script defines a Django custom management command that ensures the SQLite database file connection is represented by a symbolic link at a specific path within the backend directory. It checks the current configuration and filesystem state to create, verify, or avoid overwriting the symlink to maintain consistency between the configured database and the filesystem.

classes.name: Command
classes.description: A Django management command class that creates or verifies a symbolic link pointing to the configured SQLite database file to ensure consistency and simplify database access during development and operations.

methods.name: handle(self, *args, **options)
methods.description: Main method invoked when the command runs; it creates or verifies the symbolic link 'db.sqlite3' in the backend directory pointing to the configured database file, with safety checks to prevent overwriting or data loss.
